seo.title: P90X ONE on ONE Program Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Work on any part of your body you want with P90X ONE on ONE. See what the program includes, any equipment needed, and meet your trainer here.

trainers.bioBodi: Tony has revolutionized the fitness world by helping millions of people get ripped and get healthy with his total-body workouts. He’s collaborated with BODi on some of our biggest programs, pushing people all over the world to work towards their own extreme body transformations.

data.descriptionShort: Flying high after P90X? Add even more Muscle Confusion™ with P90X ONE on ONE.
data.descriptionLong: If you have parts of your body that need more punishment, now you can cherry pick from all three 12-DVD volume sets, all designed to help you bust through plateaus and get your most ripped.

modules.equipment: Dumbbells, Resistance Bands, Chin-Up Bar, Medicine Ball, Stability Ball, Push-Up Stands, Yoga Mat*
modules.categories: Muscle Building, Core, Yoga, Cardio, Strength, Bodyweight Training

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

Turns out that torturous little moves like the Inchworm, X-Plank Spider Twist, and Banana Ball Crunch could leave you in a heap on the floor. Feel like a sweat bath? Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZHp5Nf.descriptionLong: Yoga really is the fountain of youth. And the key to getting the most out of every movement? Focused breathing. Get ready for nuances not seen before, like lifted toes and hand placement for super intensity. Do NOT expect a walk in the park.
